case_title: RED CARPET SERVICE VS THE REALLY GOOD PUBLISHING CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $91.52 FILED BY RED CARPET SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE REALLY GOOD PUBLISHING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE REALLY GOOD PUBLISHING CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RED CARPET SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE REALLY GOOD PUBLISHING CO. $91.52 PRINCIPAL, $37.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $129.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THE REALLY GOOD PUBLISHING CO.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $156.72 AS TO DEFENDANT THE REALLY GOOD PUBLISHING CO.
